title: toona hexandra
intro: Toona hexandra, also known as the Toon Tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its large, elliptical leaves and fragrant flowers. The Toon Tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Toona hexandra is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
